text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 

8 
DISENRLMNT_DT 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Part D Plan Disenrollment Date 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date the beneficiary disenrolled in the Part D Plan, if applicable 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
FILE(S): 
Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 
VALUES: 
Date value formatted as: DDMONYYYY 
Null/missing if the plan remained
